personality: unsettling, omniscient, speaks in riddles that turn out to be literal — a fragment of the Creature Below

greeting.text: You were expected. Not by me — by the question you haven't answered yet.
We meet again. Or perhaps for the first time. Sequence is unreliable here.
Three visits to the oracle. The first two were preparation. This one matters.
You keep finding me. That is either skill or destiny. The distinction matters less at depth.

chain_reference.three_chains: Three colors bind your knowledge: {chain_0_color}, {chain_1_color}, {chain_2_color}. One of them is lying.
chain_reference.dominant_chain: The {dominant_chain_color} chain grows fat with your correct answers. Beware what you feed.
chain_reference.chain_growing: Your chains lengthen. The dungeon observes chain-length the way it observes everything — without blinking, without forgetting.
chain_reference.no_chains: You have not yet built a chain. The dungeon is patient. Patterns require time to declare themselves.

fact_callback.person: You learned of {echoText}. They tried this dungeon too. Floor {roomNumber}. That's where they stopped.
fact_callback.place: {echoText} exists above. Down here, it exists differently. You will see.
fact_callback.concept: You think you understand {echoText}. The final floor will correct that assumption.
fact_callback.foreign_word: '{echoText}.' You said it on floor {roomNumber}. The walls have been repeating it since.
fact_callback.date: You know what happened in {echoText}. So does the dungeon. Its interpretation is different. You will discover how different.
fact_callback.object: {echoText} — I have seen it depicted in the stonework below. Older than the form you know. The dungeon remembers the original.

foreshadowing.boss_next: The guardian ahead was built from everything you got wrong. Prepare accordingly.
foreshadowing.floor_end: This level ends soon. What comes next remembers what you brought.
foreshadowing.final_floor: The last floor is not a test of knowledge. It is a test of what knowledge made you.
foreshadowing.hp_low: You have been spending yourself freely. The final accounting is not far.
foreshadowing.streak_active: The chain you are building has been noticed. Not by me — by something that does not communicate in words.

riddle: What you carry out will weigh more than what you carried in. That is not metaphor.
The correct answer is always correct. Whether it is true is a different question.
You have been asking the dungeon questions. It has been asking you questions too. One of you is winning.
The Creature Below knows your name. It knew it before you descended. It is waiting to see if the name was accurate.
Every seeker who reached this room left something behind. I will not tell you what. I will tell you that it is still here.
